contents.content: This is a basic game I created in Unity with the Universal Render Pipeline, based on the coin golf minigame in the game Fable.

I spent 2 weeks in total working on this game. I scripted each of the mechanics myself, and created a basic shader to display the arrow that represents the coin's launch force. I created all of the art myself using Blender, and added sound effects that I downloaded from freesound.org.
Here is a link to my Github repo for the Unity project: Coin Golf
